titleStmt.title: SII 9.512: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 512. (A.R. No. 424 of 1928.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP ON THE SAME SITE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1442, Vikrama, Chaitra, śu. 14, Ādivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1520 April 1, Sunday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, while Vijayappoḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya, Śaṅkara Seṭṭi, son of Allu Seṭṭi of Seṭṭivāḍi, built a maṭha, out of the gold of his grand-daughter, Tirumakka-Rāvutiti, who had no children and endowed it with some plots of land. He also made a gift for the service of the god, Nakharēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīgaṇādhipataĒṁ namaḥ śrīsarasvatyāēṁ namaḥ śrīgurubhyōṁ nama[ḥ .*] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi
caṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhē mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayādbhudaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1441 saṁdu nālvattaEraḍaneya vartamāna vikramasaṁvatsarada cayi
tra śu 14 Ādivāradalū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kṛṣṇarāyamahārā
yarū vijayanagarada siṁhvāsanadalū sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda sakala sāṁbrājyavanu pratipā
lisutiha kāladalū Avara nirūpadiṁda vijayappoḍeyarū bārakkūra rājyavanu pratipālisutiha sa
mayadalū naṁdruvaḷiya huṭṭina kuḷeyara baḷiyavanu seṭṭivāḍiya Alluseṭṭiya maga saṁkaraseṭṭi
tanna moṁmagaḷu tirumakkarāutitige saṁtānavillada saṁmaṁdha Ākeya hoṁnu bhaṁgāradalū maṭhava ka
ṭṭi dharmakke biṭṭa bāḷa vivara kabunāḍalu mēkāra Akkamahebāritiya maga saṁkarahebārana mūlada hiri
gade hāḍi saha ba mu 4 Aḍiya gade mu 3 mekke 3 malla gade maki saha mu 5 Aṁtu mu 15 gadeyanū saṁkaraseṭṭi
ya taṁma nāraṇaseṭi Aruvārava māḍikoṇḍu koṭa Artha doḍavaraha ga 88 �yo bāḷige gēṇi Utarāyaṇaśaṁkrāṁti
ge brāhmarige Aḍige Akki mu ... 0 kaḷaci śudha Akki mu 21 . 0 mattaṁ keḷākaḷiyalū kōṭīśvaraAghaḍi kēśaAgha
ḍiya mūla saṁkappabhaṭara Aruvāra nāraṇaseṭi Antarāruvāra māḍi koṁḍa bāḷa catusīme nāḍa haḍahina gaḍi
yiṁ paḍuvalu harida sāliṁ baḍagalu Upādhyara Uddina tāṟa saritadiṁ mūḍalu nāḍa tiṭiyavara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu �yo
nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage tiṭiyavara mūṟu muḍi gade hoṟatāgi bittu ba mu 13 . 0 Aruvāra kuṁduhoḍekaṭṭina
mūlādi maisāla sahita doḍava ga 15 ... 0 Arthakke nāraṇaseṭṭi Aṁtarāruvāravāgi koṭidu bārakkūra parivartana salu
va doḍa va ga 73 A bāḷige teṟuva teṟu vosari . = mattaṁ māṇikoḷala keḷākaḷiyalū yeḍemaneya saṁkharahebāruna mūla sa
ṁkappabhaṭara Aruvāravānu Aṁtarāruvāgi māḍi koṁḍa sarvasva catusīme cippina gade mūḍalu saṁkarahabāra taṁna gariyiṁ paḍuvalu
harida sāliṁda baḍagalu harida hoḷeyiṁ mūḍalu vāsudēvahebārana gaḍiyiṁ tenkalu nālku gaḍiya voḷage bāḷu mu 2 ... 8 ma
ne muṁdaṇa mallagade nāḍa gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu dāri saha mu ... Ubhayaṁmu 3 . 9 Aruvāra kuṁdu hoḍekaṭu mūlādhi maisāla sa
ha va ga 3 . kke nāraṇaseṭi koṭa doḍa va ga 22 �yo bāḷige teṟu saṁkharahabārana mūlada sarvasvake voṁdu vosari teṟinalū baṁda sari
te �yo bāḷige teṟu gaṭṭi 2 yeraḍu bageya bāḷige gēṇi nāghaṁḍugadalū Aki mu 32 mattaṁ Avaḷāḍiya voḷage kēsaṇa maidana
mūla gōviṁdavaidyana gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu kōcala baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu jōgiya hitila gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu harida ho
ḷeyiṁ teṁkalu �yo nālku catussīmeyiṁdoḷage bitaṇake mu 4 gade Ali mane haṭi bhāvi kaṇa Artha keṟe Anubha tōṭa sahita bi
ḍāruvārava māḍikoṁḍu Aruvāra kuṇḍu hoḍekaṭu mulādi maisāla sahita koṭu doḍa va ga 25 �yo bāḷige nārusaṭi hari
mū 1 . ge ghaṭiga ¥ 1 . 9 varaha vi ga ¥ 2 . �yoteṟu kaḷaci Aki mu 5 mataṁ baḍākereya voḷage rāmabhaṭana mūla bāḷu
koḍala gade mu 2 . Aruvāravāgi koṭa doḍavaraha 23 yidake teṟu kaḷaci naḍasuva A mu 2 . mataṁ helakāveya vo
ḷage bācaṁṇauḍupara mūla maṁḍikeya nāraṇaseṭṭiya vobhāgakke baṁda baddāḍiya gadeya catusīme maṁjana hāḷiya gaḍiyiṁ
paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu harida sāliṁdaṁ mūḍalu mēlu baddādiyiṁ teṁkalu �yo nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gade mu
ḍe 2 . baḍaga beṭinalū pukaṇṇaneṁbadu mu 1 . 0 mane haṭi kaḷa saha Arthādiyāgi koṭa varaha ga 20 mūli nārāyaṇau
ḍuparu koṁḍa maisāla vara ga 4 . yidaṟa Aki mu 5 Aḷiya sadānaṁdaseṭi māḍidu Three lines were written and erased after this.
naḍavala nāḍa mu 9 teṟu kaḷaci mēkareya bāḷa Akivoḷa
ge dēuseṭige vobana dharma mattaṁ sankaraseṭṭi nakharēśvaramahādēvālyadalu naḍasuvaṁtāgi rāmanavamige māḍida dharma Upina kudu
re kaḍamāravoḷage hāsaṁgaḍiya śambhubhaṭṭana maga rāmabhaṭana mūlada bāḷu bikaṇake mu 5 ge Aruvāravāgi koṭa doḍa va ga 25 teṟu ka
ḷaci naḍava Aki nāghaṁḍuga mu 4 . ke pradōśakke mu 1 . 0 rāmanavamige mu 3 mattaṁ saṁkaraseṭiya magaḷu baḷagāṟa baḷiya saṁkaṁmase
ṭiti māḍida dharmakaṁ nā
struck off
mataṁ Aṁtasaṭi
māḍida dharma naradruvaḷiya harajīyalū vopakanakkatitiya mūlada bāḷu hiriya gade mu 1 . 0 kallina Uḍi mu 1 mekke mu 1 . 0 ga
Uri hāḷi ma ... 0 bācana baḷiya mu 1 Aḍake baḷi mu . 5 bidireḍiya gade mu 1 . 0 maki mu 2 Aṁtu mu 10 . ge teṟa ga 2 . 3
gēṇi Akki nāghaṁḍugadalū mu 22 teṟuva ga 2 . 3 mataṁ saṁkaraseṭiya bage dharma 1 nāraṇaseṭiya bage dharma 2 kke Anegaḷiya
lū hutina tāṟu gade mu 7 Ardhavaraha ga 65 ke teṟu kaḷaci naḍava Aki mu 9 dēvapūjege keḷākaḷiya Akiyali dharmake
mu 9 tirumakarāutiti bage dharma dēvapūjege mēkāreya bageyalū A mu 9 nāraṇaseṭiya makaḷu sadānaṁda Allu
bera bageya dharma 2 ke keḷākaḷiyalū A mu 13 helakāveyalū A mu 5 naṁdādīvige saha parvada veccake A
mu 15 ke mekareya bageyalū A mu 3 badākareyalū A mu 2 . kēsaṇavaidya gōviṁdavaidya bageya A mu 6
bhāvasaṁvacharadalū keṁcanūra vāsubhaṁḍāriya santāna gaṇapakaAḍahiti bīraṇabhaṁḍāriya mūlada bāḷu
taṁbaḷagaddeya naḍuUḍi ba mu 2 . 0 narasiṁhabhaṁḍāriya nālvattu hānayiṁda keḷagaṇa ba hāḷi hāne 15 haraḷana U
ḍi ba hā 30 mallagade mūḍaṇa Uḍi mu 1 kallasaṁkara modala meke hāḷi hā 10 huṇise Aḍiya maki hā 10 teṁkanaḍi
ya maki hā 30 Aṁtu Ome ma saha mu 5 hā 10 mūḍaṇamane ṭhāu kaḷa haṭi teṁgu halasu māu Anubha saha
�yo sarvasvavanu saṁkaraseṭiya Aḷiya sadānaṁdaseṭi biḍāruvāravāgi biḍisikoṁḍu koṭa va ga 23
yī Artha baṁdarū Urati baṁdarū saṁkaraseṭi maṭhake māḍida dharmake sadānaṁdaseṭi biṭudu vibhavasaṁvachsa
radali keḻadiya karuvabara baḷiya beṁmaṇaheggaḍeya taṁma saṁkuheggaḍe taṁna heṁḍati Akāhegga
ḍitiya badiya hoṁnige biḍāruvāruvāgi biṭa Abiyagadeya baḍagaṁṇa Uḍi bittaṇake nā
lvaṁḍeyalu mu 2 Adaṟa mēle varaha ga 25 Adake kaṭuṁdeṟu ¥ 3 yī bāḷa Artha baṁda rū Urati
baṁdarū saṁkaraseṭi māḍida dharmake dēuseṭi biṭadu maṭhake . dānapāla nayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyō
nrupālanaṁ dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . nāgaṇasēnabōvara maga harisēnabōvara baraha .
Digital edition of SII 9.512 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
